items.content_html: This is a macro that whenever you press ctrl + q it will send the cat gif combo to whoever is selected on discord keep in mind that discord has to be open to use this macro and if it doesn't work the first time with the .exe then just try to install autohotkey version 2 and then run the .exe.
items.title: TheHunt990/DiscordCatCombo: This is a macro that whenever you press ctrl + q it will send the cat gif combo to whoever is selected on discord keep in mind that discord has to be open to use this macro and if it doesn't work the first time with the .exe then just try to install autohotkey version 2 and then run the .exe.
